channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Mamdani gives New York Knicks keys to city after NBA title
item.description: The New York Knicks celebrated their first NBA title in 53 years with a frenzied ticker-tape parade through Manhattan.

item.title: Are prices really dropping in the US, as Trump claims?
item.description: Donald Trump boasts on social media that since signing of MoU for peace deal, oil is flowing and prices are dropping.

item.title: Cuba’s Communist Party approves opening economy in unprecedented move
item.description: The emergency economic package comes amid an ongoing US pressure campaign that has left the island nation reeling.

item.title: Myanmar military airstrike kills seven civilians in Rakhine state
item.description: A Myanmar military airstrike on the Rakhine state town of Kyauktaw killed at least seven civilians.

item.title: Brazil executes warrant against Lula ally in widening financial scandal
item.description: Left-wing Senator Jaques Wagner was the latest prominent figure to be swept up in investigations into Banco Master.

item.title: Conjoined twins separated after surgery in Saudi Arabia
item.description: Filipino conjoined twins Olivia and Gianna were successfully separated during a six-hour surgery in Saudi Arabia.

item.title: Neymar will not play in Brazil’s World Cup match against Haiti due to injury
item.description: Brazil's record goal-scorer continues to struggle with injuries after being named in their World Cup 2026 squad.

item.title: Ivory Coast’s Elye Wahi granted Canadian visa hours after denial
item.description: The forward will now be able to join his team in Toronto when they take on Germany on Saturday.

item.title: Netanyahu says Israel must protect relationship with US
item.description: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu pressed for the ‘preservation’ of Israel’s relationship with the US.

item.title: Pro-Israel hawks in US criticise Iran MoU but avoid clashing with Trump
item.description: Analysts warn that pro-Israel groups and politicians in Washington will likely push to derail diplomacy with Tehran.

item.title: Iran’s supreme leader says approved US deal despite having ‘different’ view
item.description: Iran says it has suspended Strait of Hormuz transit charges for commercial vessels for 60 days.

item.title: Gaza fans chase World Cup joy amid blackout, displacement and war
item.description: World Cup matches offer residents of Gaza a brief escape from war, blackouts and life in tents.

item.title: Lionel Messi’s father undergoing treatment for health issues, family says
item.description: Family statement comes two days after an emotional Messi wiped away tears in Argentina's World Cup match against Algeria.

item.title: At least 29 countries raise alarm about atrocities in Sudan’s el-Obeid
item.description: UN and allies warn of grave rights violations in North Kordofan, ⁠urge maximum pressure on ⁠RSF and SAF.

item.title: MoU’s $300bn Iran reconstruction fund becomes US political flashpoint
item.description: Trump says US will not pay for planned fund as part of Iran MoU, as lawmakers connect price tag to affordability issues.

item.title: US military says it has lifted naval blockade of Iranian ports
item.description: CENTCOM says that all blockade enforcement efforts 'have ceased' but that US forces will remain in the area.

item.title: Can the Global South have a say in global affairs?
item.description: China calls for stronger representation for emerging economies.

item.title: World Cup 2026: South Africa grab draw with Czechia with late penalty
item.description: Teboho Mokoena equalises through a late penalty to salvage a draw for South Africa in their Group A clash with Czechia.

item.title: Pakistan signs US-Iran MoU
item.description: Pakistan’s Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif signed a US-Iran memorandum of understanding aimed at ending the war.

item.title: Israel says cutting ties with top EU diplomat over ‘apartheid’ comments
item.description: The UN rights office has previously found that Israel is violating international laws that prohibit apartheid.

item.title: Somalia warns Israel against meddling in Somaliland
item.description: The message came after Somaliland opened its first overseas embassy this week, in Jerusalem.

item.title: US vice president slams Israel over criticism of Trump’s Iran deal
item.description: JD Vance slammed members of Israel’s government for criticising US President Donald Trump over his Iran deal efforts.

item.title: Grief, tears as families hold rites for Indian sailors killed in US strike
item.description: Grief, tears as families hold last rites for Indian sailors killed in US strike.

item.title: Giant Messi portrait carved into a Philippine beach for the World Cup
item.description: A Filipino artist has created a giant sand portrait of Lionel Messi on a beach in Tandag, Philippines.

item.title: Zimbabwe lawmakers back bill to extend president’s term in office
item.description: Lower house of parliament passes legislation to extend presidential terms from five to seven years.
